1.description: Deductible amount. The amount applied to the deductible.

4.description: The service/equipment/drug is not covered by the plan. However, as a courtesy we are notifying you.

11.description: The diagnosis is inconsistent with the procedure. At least one Remark Code must be provided.

16.description: Claim/service lacks information or has submission/billing error(s). Usage: Do not use this code for claims attachment(s)/other documentation.

22.description: This care may be covered by another payer per coordination of benefits.

29.description: The time limit for filing has expired.

50.description: These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a 'medical necessity' by the payer.

55.description: Procedure/treatment/drug is deemed experimental/investigational by the payer.

96.description: Non-covered charge(s). At least one Remark Code must be provided.

97.description: The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure that has already been adjudicated.

167.description: This (these) diagnosis(es) is (are) not covered. At least one Remark Code must be provided.

170.description: Payment is denied when performed/billed by this type of provider.

B7.description: This provider was not certified/eligible to be paid for this procedure/service on this date of service.

M86.description: Service denied because payment already made for same/similar procedure within set time frame.

N56.description: Procedure code billed is not correct/valid for the services billed or the date of service billed.

N104.description: This claim/service is not payable under our claim's processing system. Please resubmit to the correct payer/processor.

N115.description: This decision was based on a Local Coverage Determination (LCD). An LCD provides a guide to assist in determining whether a particular item or service is covered.

N362.description: Alert: At least one Remark Code must be provided.

MA04.description: Secondary payment cannot be considered without the identity of or payment information from the primary payer.

MA130.description: Your claim contains incomplete and/or invalid information, and no appeal rights are afforded because the claim is unprocessable.
